rationale: In the citing paper, Zhao and Pechmann (2007) is used mainly as a prior example in the introductory literature review (regulatory-focus congruence in antismoking ads) and as a citation in Table 1 showing studies that used a particular chronic focus scale. The paper does not build its core arguments, measurement assessment design, or analyses on that specific study. Its central contribution is a psychometric comparison of chronic regulatory focus measures, and this cited work serves only contextual/background purposes within that broader review.
